description_long: This is a single-story residential house set within a fenced yard, surrounded by a variety of trees and shrubs. The house features a flat roof with visible beams and skylights, and its exterior walls are finished in a mix of pastel colors, including pink, yellow, and beige. Large windows and sliding glass doors are present on several sides, allowing for ample natural light and views of the garden. The property includes a paved driveway leading to a covered entryway, which is accentuated by a small porch and landscaping. The yard is well-maintained, with grassy areas and decorative bushes providing privacy and aesthetic appeal. The overall design is modern and open, with a focus on indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, pastel-colored exterior walls, large windows, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, and a landscaped yard with several trees and a driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, multiple rooms, and the arrangement of windows and garden space.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying sliding glass doors, backyard lawn, and additional trees along the fence line.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the driveway, side entrance, and more of the house's flat roof and pastel wall sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, modern door, and landscaped approach
